activities_projects.title: Main Characters List
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main characters in the story
steps: Read the story carefully
List the main characters in the lesson
Write one sentence describing each character

activities_projects.title: Character Sketch of Toto
steps: Read the parts describing Toto
Write 4–5 lines describing Toto’s appearance and behaviour

activities_projects.title: Grandfather’s Love for Animals
steps: Read the lesson
Write three points showing why Grandfather loved animals

activities_projects.title: How Toto Came Home
activities_projects.objective: Understand how Toto became part of the family
steps: Find the part where Grandfather buys Toto
Write 3–4 sentences explaining how Toto came home

activities_projects.title: Toto’s Mischief
steps: Read the story carefully
List three mischievous acts done by Toto

activities_projects.title: The Train Journey
activities_projects.objective: Understand the incident at the railway station
steps: Read the part about the train journey
Write 3–4 sentences explaining what happened with the ticket collector
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands a key event in the story

activities_projects.title: Toto’s Bath
steps: Read the section about Toto’s bath
Write 3–4 sentences explaining how Toto takes a bath

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Lesson
steps: Choose five new words from the lesson
Write their meanings
Use each word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the flow of the story
steps: Identify four important events in the story
Write them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: Why Toto Was Sold
activities_projects.objective: Understand the ending of the story
steps: Read the last part of the lesson
Write 3–4 sentences explaining why Toto was sold back to the tonga-driver
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the conclusion of the story
